title: Claustodian Snapshot
description: The full set of symbols known to exist as of one specific Claude Code version. Used for both per-version files (data/versions/X.Y.Z.json) and the rolled-up alias (data/latest.json).

claudeCodeVersion.description: The Claude Code version this snapshot represents.

schemaVersion.description: The Claustodian data-format schema version this snapshot conforms to.

symbols.description: The symbol records known as of this version. May be empty.
